title: BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal classes help parents feel calm and confident with the birthing process, while reducing the duration of labor. Topics include prenatal, and postpartum nutrition, relief for common discomforts during pregnancy, creating a birth plan, stages of labor, calming a crying baby, and car seat installation. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service. All home visits are scheduled with families in advance per their need. Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childbirth Education Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN IN BETWEEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
